sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: I can see from the image that the player is now near the bottom-center blue square. The white frame on the left is still visible. Let me check the exact position and try to convert the bottom-center frame.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'W', 'b', 'c', 'g']:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"{n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check ascii around player and bottom frame
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nBottom region (rows 33-42, cols 26-40):")
for i in range(33, 42):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][26:42]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
